title: Partition Index
hints: Use the partition algorithm from quicksort with the last element as pivot.
Use two pointers: one from the start (i) and one from the second-to-last element (j).
Move i forward when A[i] < pivot, move j backward when A[j] > pivot.
When A[i] >= pivot and A[j] <= pivot, swap them.
After the loop, swap the pivot (last element) with A[i] to place it in the correct position.
Return the index i where the pivot is placed.
